channel.title: fitgreenmind TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from fitgreenmind

item.title: Do you want the recipe…? 😋 #tofu #crispytofu #foodtok
item.description: Do you want the recipe…? 😋 #tofu #crispytofu #foodtok

item.title: Antwort auf @jajadejau Extra CRISPY tofu 😍 I tell you I haven’t made a crispier tofu yet and it’s SO EASY to get that result! 😋 Thanks to @thehungrywarrior for the rice paper inspo! 😉 RECIPE (1 servings, 25min prep time): -200g tofu, cut into 8 sticks W
item.description: Antwort auf @jajadejau Extra CRISPY tofu 😍 I tell you I haven’t made a crispier tofu yet and it’s SO EASY to get that result! 😋 Thanks to @thehungrywarrior for the rice paper inspo! 😉 RECIPE (1 servings, 25min prep time): -200g tofu, cut into 8 sticks W

item.title: I’m really disappointed from Bananito and Strawberella 😔 #foodtok
item.description: I’m really disappointed from Bananito and Strawberella 😔 #foodtok

item.title: VEGANE MAYO 🌱 In 2min gemacht! 🙌 Diese vegane Mayo ist 100% idiotensicher, in nur 2min gemacht und ich finde, sie schmeckt besser als Gekaufte. 😋 Und was wir da leckeres reingedippt haben seht ihr bald bei @Shabnam 🍋 the hungry warrior 🫶 REZEPT (2 kleine

item.title: If you’re stressed, desserts definitely help 💁‍♀️ #foodtok#cookie #veganfood
item.description: If you’re stressed, desserts definitely help 💁‍♀️ #foodtok#cookie #veganfood

item.title: COOKING FOR ONE SUCKS…😤 but it doesn’t have to and the solution is NOT a boyfriend or a dishwasher! ;) Since moving out I changed my way of cooking a little bit, so follow along for plant-based recipes that 🌱 are easy and quick to make 🌱 use minimal equip
item.description: COOKING FOR ONE SUCKS…😤 but it doesn’t have to and the solution is NOT a boyfriend or a dishwasher! ;) Since moving out I changed my way of cooking a little bit, so follow along for plant-based recipes that 🌱 are easy and quick to make 🌱 use minimal equip

item.title: You can do hard things if you really commit to something 🫶
item.description: You can do hard things if you really commit to something 🫶

item.title: CRISPY RICE PAPER DUMPLINGS 🥟 So easy and so good! 😋 No chop, no stove, no stress dinner ready in 20mins and of course it’s vegan too! 😌 RECIPE (1 serving, 20min prep time): -100g tofu, crumbled -2 Tsp soy sauce -2 Tsp white wine vinegar -1/2 Tsp five s
item.description: CRISPY RICE PAPER DUMPLINGS 🥟 So easy and so good! 😋 No chop, no stove, no stress dinner ready in 20mins and of course it’s vegan too! 😌 RECIPE (1 serving, 20min prep time): -100g tofu, crumbled -2 Tsp soy sauce -2 Tsp white wine vinegar -1/2 Tsp five s

item.title: (Werbung/Ad) BBQ dinner party 🍖 🌱 Believe it or not but this spread is COMPLETELY plant-based thanks to the @Planted. steaks and skewers! 😋 I grilled the planted.steak Herbs, the planted.steak Paprika and the planted.skewers Herbs and my whole family (in
item.description: (Werbung/Ad) BBQ dinner party 🍖 🌱 Believe it or not but this spread is COMPLETELY plant-based thanks to the @Planted. steaks and skewers! 😋 I grilled the planted.steak Herbs, the planted.steak Paprika and the planted.skewers Herbs and my whole family (in

item.title: Antwort auf @jazziehands🌈 This is just what helped me and maybe it helps you too🫶 #weightgain
item.description: Antwort auf @jazziehands🌈 This is just what helped me and maybe it helps you too🫶 #weightgain

item.title: This and NO OTHER potato salad! 🙅‍♀️ RECIPE potato salad: -1kg small potatoes, cook 6-7mins Drain and cut in chunks. -1 Tbsp oil -salt to taste -2 Tsp paprika Bake or air fry at 200C for 20-30mins. Dressing: -1 big Tbsp vegan cream cheese -3 Tbsp vegan y
item.description: This and NO OTHER potato salad! 🙅‍♀️ RECIPE potato salad: -1kg small potatoes, cook 6-7mins Drain and cut in chunks. -1 Tbsp oil -salt to taste -2 Tsp paprika Bake or air fry at 200C for 20-30mins. Dressing: -1 big Tbsp vegan cream cheese -3 Tbsp vegan y

item.title: If I can do that, you can do it too! 🫶🫶
item.description: If I can do that, you can do it too! 🫶🫶

item.title: Single serve gnocchi 🥔 With one big potato you can make a single serving of gnocchi in just 25mins! 😋 Perfect for all my single ladies (and boys 😉) RECIPE (1 serving, 25min prep time): -1 big potato (about 200g) Cook until fork tender and mash -60g flou
item.description: Single serve gnocchi 🥔 With one big potato you can make a single serving of gnocchi in just 25mins! 😋 Perfect for all my single ladies (and boys 😉) RECIPE (1 serving, 25min prep time): -1 big potato (about 200g) Cook until fork tender and mash -60g flou

item.title: SINGLE SERVE COOKIE🍪 This is a cookie that does not want to be shared…👀 RECIPE (1 serving, 20min prep time): -1 Tbsp melted vegan butter -1 Tsp vegan yogurt -2 Tbsp sugar -a pinch of salt Mix well. -3 Tbsp flour -1/4 Tsp baking powder -a handful chocola
item.description: SINGLE SERVE COOKIE🍪 This is a cookie that does not want to be shared…👀 RECIPE (1 serving, 20min prep time): -1 Tbsp melted vegan butter -1 Tsp vegan yogurt -2 Tbsp sugar -a pinch of salt Mix well. -3 Tbsp flour -1/4 Tsp baking powder -a handful chocola

item.title: Anything I put in there takes 15-20mins… ANYTHING 🤷‍♀️ #veganfood #foodtok
item.description: Anything I put in there takes 15-20mins… ANYTHING 🤷‍♀️ #veganfood #foodtok

item.title: DANGEROUSLY GOOD CARROTS 🥕 Once you made carrots like this, you’ll never make them any other way again! ;) RECIPE (1 serving, 20min prep time): -4 small carrots, peeled Shred or slice thinly. -oil -1/2 Tsp ground coriander -1 Tsp ground cumin -1 Tsp must
item.description: DANGEROUSLY GOOD CARROTS 🥕 Once you made carrots like this, you’ll never make them any other way again! ;) RECIPE (1 serving, 20min prep time): -4 small carrots, peeled Shred or slice thinly. -oil -1/2 Tsp ground coriander -1 Tsp ground cumin -1 Tsp must

item.title: bUt WHeRe’s ThE meAt?🥴 #veganfood #veganbbq #bbq
item.description: bUt WHeRe’s ThE meAt?🥴 #veganfood #veganbbq #bbq

item.title: CRISPY TOFU WRAP 🌯 Don’t like tofu? No way, try this first! 🫵 It’s easy to make, high in protein and I’m low-key obsessed with it! 🌝 RECIPE (1 serving, 30min prep time): -200g tofu, shredded -1 Tsp curry powder or your favorite spice mix -1 Tsp soy sauce
item.description: CRISPY TOFU WRAP 🌯 Don’t like tofu? No way, try this first! 🫵 It’s easy to make, high in protein and I’m low-key obsessed with it! 🌝 RECIPE (1 serving, 30min prep time): -200g tofu, shredded -1 Tsp curry powder or your favorite spice mix -1 Tsp soy sauce

item.title: Michelin star whooo?🤪 #foodtok #veganfood
item.description: Michelin star whooo?🤪 #foodtok #veganfood

item.title: LAZY BABA GANOUSH 🍆 I think this might be favorite single serve recipe so far…👀 Disclaimer: this is not an authentic version! :) RECIPE (1 serving, 30min prep time): -1 eggplant Pierce with a fork and bake or air fry at 200C for 20-25mins until soft. Cut
item.description: LAZY BABA GANOUSH 🍆 I think this might be favorite single serve recipe so far…👀 Disclaimer: this is not an authentic version! :) RECIPE (1 serving, 30min prep time): -1 eggplant Pierce with a fork and bake or air fry at 200C for 20-25mins until soft. Cut

item.title: Here’s how you can cook a single serving of rice… perfect for all single ladies like me!🤓
item.description: Here’s how you can cook a single serving of rice… perfect for all single ladies like me!🤓

item.title: PBJ OVERNIGHT OATS 🥜🍓 You can prep breakfast for ONE week in 15mins with these easy, plant-based, high protein breakfast jars! 🫙 Aka the reason why I look forward to getting up in the morning…👀 RECIPE (5 jars, 15min prep time): -200g oats or spelt flakes
item.description: PBJ OVERNIGHT OATS 🥜🍓 You can prep breakfast for ONE week in 15mins with these easy, plant-based, high protein breakfast jars! 🫙 Aka the reason why I look forward to getting up in the morning…👀 RECIPE (5 jars, 15min prep time): -200g oats or spelt flakes

item.title: LAZY PASTA 🍝 I think boiling pasta doesn’t count as “cooking”!😼 RECIPE (1 serving, 20min prep time): -165g cherry tomatoes -1 Tsp dried Italian herbs -salt to taste -olive oil to drizzle -1 Tbsp vegan cream cheese Add to a baking dish and bake or air fry
item.description: LAZY PASTA 🍝 I think boiling pasta doesn’t count as “cooking”!😼 RECIPE (1 serving, 20min prep time): -165g cherry tomatoes -1 Tsp dried Italian herbs -salt to taste -olive oil to drizzle -1 Tbsp vegan cream cheese Add to a baking dish and bake or air fry

item.title: Let’s get to actually now each other! 🫶 So hey, I’m Maya, I’m 21 years old and 5 weeks ago I moved to a new city. 🕺 I love cooking, all things sporty and I physically can’t cut my own fingernails (🥲). Now it’s your turn! 👇😉
item.description: Let’s get to actually now each other! 🫶 So hey, I’m Maya, I’m 21 years old and 5 weeks ago I moved to a new city. 🕺 I love cooking, all things sporty and I physically can’t cut my own fingernails (🥲). Now it’s your turn! 👇😉

item.title: All you need for a little fun lemonade is mint, lime and sugar 😋
item.description: All you need for a little fun lemonade is mint, lime and sugar 😋

item.title: LOADED POTATO NACHOS 🥔 I had a vision for this dinner and it turned out even better than I thought! 😋 Delicious, quick and easy to make… there’s not more to ask for! 🤝 RECIPE (1 serving, 30min prep time): -2 potatoes, cut in wedges -oil -salt to taste -
item.description: LOADED POTATO NACHOS 🥔 I had a vision for this dinner and it turned out even better than I thought! 😋 Delicious, quick and easy to make… there’s not more to ask for! 🤝 RECIPE (1 serving, 30min prep time): -2 potatoes, cut in wedges -oil -salt to taste -

item.title: Which dish from your culture should I try? 👇 Let’s create a COMMUNITY WORLD MAP together! 🗺️ This community is spread all over the world which is a beautiful thing, so to connect all of us through cooking I wanna try YOUR FAVORITE DISHES! I’m going first
item.description: Which dish from your culture should I try? 👇 Let’s create a COMMUNITY WORLD MAP together! 🗺️ This community is spread all over the world which is a beautiful thing, so to connect all of us through cooking I wanna try YOUR FAVORITE DISHES! I’m going first

item.title: Soba noodle salad 🍜 Being cringe is being free, so be yourself, don’t care what others think and make these delicious and quick noodles!☝️😋 RECIPE (1 serving, 15min prep time): -1/2 zucchini -1 carrot -50g tempeh Finely chop or slice and sauté in some oi
item.description: Soba noodle salad 🍜 Being cringe is being free, so be yourself, don’t care what others think and make these delicious and quick noodles!☝️😋 RECIPE (1 serving, 15min prep time): -1/2 zucchini -1 carrot -50g tempeh Finely chop or slice and sauté in some oi

item.title: BAKED OATS 🍰 Or actually NO OATS because I’m always using spelt flakes instead but you get the point…😉 Once a week a friend and I at work have breakfast together, this is what I brought last time and maybeeee it was a win. 👀 RECIPE (2 servings, 25min pre
item.description: BAKED OATS 🍰 Or actually NO OATS because I’m always using spelt flakes instead but you get the point…😉 Once a week a friend and I at work have breakfast together, this is what I brought last time and maybeeee it was a win. 👀 RECIPE (2 servings, 25min pre
